case_title: PABLO CESAR SANTOS VS. RICHARD VILLASENOR

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTOS, PABLO CESAR GARCIA AS TO DEFENDANT VILLASENOR, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL DBA R.A.V. CONSTRUCTION
